Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "SELECT id, title, substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for 300\) as sample FROM \\"Episode\\" WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%charente%' OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%marseille%' OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%lyon%' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "SELECT count\(*\) as total_locations, count\(DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\"\) as episodes_with_locs, avg\(locs_per_ep\) as avg_locs FROM \(SELECT \\"episodeId\\", count\(*\) as locs_per_ep FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\" GROUP BY \\"episodeId\\"\) sub;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "SELECT e.title, count\(el.*\) as locs FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id GROUP BY e.id ORDER BY locs DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

SELECT id, title FROM \\"Episode\\" 
WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%calédonie%'

   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%états-unis%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" ILIKE '%french connection%'

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -t -A -c "
SELECT e.id, e.title, count\(el.id\) as locs
FROM \\"Episode\\" e 
LEFT JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.id IN \(56, 160, 176, 48, 208, 20, 167, 232, 234, 299\)
GROUP BY e.id, e.title
ORDER BY e.id;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT 
  count\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" IS NOT NULL AND length\(\\"wikiSummary\\"\) > 200\) as rich_text,
  count\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" IS NULL OR length\(\\"wikiSummary\\"\) < 200\) as poor_text,
  count\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE id NOT IN \(SELECT DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\" FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\)\) as no_locations
FROM \\"Episode\\";" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.id, e.title, el.\\"communeName\\", el.\\"departmentName\\", el.\\"eventDescription\\"

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.title, count\(el.id\) as locs, string_agg\(el.\\"communeName\\" || ': ' || coalesce\(el.\\"eventDescription\\", '?'\), ' | ' ORDER BY el.id\) as details
FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.id IN \(
  19,  -- Besse \(8 locs, should be good\)
  93,  -- Mesrine
  20,  -- Dutroux
  45,  -- Emile Louis
  100, -- Fourniret
  33,  -- Guy Georges
  62,  -- Kelkal
  56,  -- French Connection
  261, -- Merah
  207  -- Alègre
\)
GROUP BY e.id, e.title
ORDER BY e.id;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT 
  \(SELECT count\(DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\"\) FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\) as episodes_with_locs,
  \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\) as total_locations,
  \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM \\"Episode\\" WHERE id NOT IN \(SELECT DISTINCT \\"episodeId\\" FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"\)\) as still_missing;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.title, count\(el.id\) as pins
FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.title ILIKE '%mesrine%' OR e.title ILIKE '%besse%' OR e.title ILIKE '%jourdain%' OR e.title ILIKE '%charron%' OR e.title ILIKE '%tallineau%' OR e.title ILIKE '%heaulme%' OR e.title ILIKE '%fourniret%'
GROUP BY e.id, e.title ORDER BY e.title;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
SELECT e.title, count\(el.id\) as pins
FROM \\"Episode\\" e JOIN \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el ON el.\\"episodeId\\" = e.id
WHERE e.id IN \(93, 100, 26, 19, 55, 62, 33, 31, 36, 46, 88, 94, 188\)
GROUP BY e.id, e.title ORDER BY e.title;")

       string_agg\(e.title, ' | ' ORDER BY e.id\) as episodes

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -t -A -c "
SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Climat ===%' THEN 'CLIMAT'
       WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Géographie ===%' THEN 'GEO'
       WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Urbanisme ===%' THEN 'URBAN'
       WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Toponymie ===%' THEN 'TOPO'
       WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Démographie ===%' THEN 'DEMO'
       WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Héraldique ===%' THEN 'HERALD'
       WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Administration ==%' THEN 'ADMIN'
       WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Personnalités liées ==%' THEN 'PERSON'
       ELSE NULL END as junk_type
FROM \\"Episode\\"
WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Climat ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Géographie ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Urbanisme ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Toponymie ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Démographie ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Héraldique ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Administration ==%'
ORDER BY id;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
UPDATE \\"Episode\\" SET \\"wikiSummary\\" = 
  CASE 
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Géographie ==%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('== Géographie ==' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Géographie et climat ==%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('== Géographie et climat ==' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Administration ==%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('== Administration ==' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Démographie ==%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('== Démographie ==' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Climat ===%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('=== Climat ===' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Géographie ===%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('=== Géographie ===' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Urbanisme ===%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('=== Urbanisme ===' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Toponymie ===%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('=== Toponymie ===' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Héraldique ===%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('=== Héraldique ===' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    WHEN \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Personnalités liées ==%' THEN substring\(\\"wikiSummary\\" from 1 for position\('== Personnalités liées ==' in \\"wikiSummary\\"\) - 1\)
    ELSE \\"wikiSummary\\"
  END
WHERE \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Climat ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Géographie ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Urbanisme ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Toponymie ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Démographie ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%=== Héraldique ===%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Administration ==%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Personnalités liées ==%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Géographie ==%'
   OR \\"wikiSummary\\" LIKE '%== Démographie ==%';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=fela_dev psql -h localhost -U fela -d fela -c "
-- Add small random offset to pins that share exact coordinates
-- Keep first pin at original position, offset subsequent ones
WITH ranked AS \(
  SELECT id, latitude, longitude,
    ROW_NUMBER\(\) OVER \(PARTITION BY latitude, longitude ORDER BY id\) as rn
  FROM \\"EpisodeLocation\\"
\)
UPDATE \\"EpisodeLocation\\" el
SET 
  latitude = el.latitude + \(r.rn - 1\) * 0.003 * \(CASE WHEN r.rn % 2 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE -1 END\),
  longitude = el.longitude + \(r.rn - 1\) * 0.004 * \(CASE WHEN r.rn % 3 = 0 THEN -1 WHEN r.rn % 3 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\)
FROM ranked r
WHERE el.id = r.id AND r.rn > 1;")
